tests.name: routes-spec-to-behavioral
tests.given: A user asks: 'I want to create a skill for reviewing pull requests'

agent_behavior: Calls generate.sh --phase spec with the target skill path
Emits instructions to declare intent and boundaries in spec.md
Does NOT emit behavioral test content in the spec phase
Next phase pointer is behavioral

tests.name: routes-behavioral-to-script-test
tests.given: A user has written spec.md and asks: 'Define the behavioral tests'
tests.when: The skills-engineering skill activates for the behavioral phase

agent_behavior: Calls generate.sh --phase behavioral with the target skill path
Emits BDD contract format with given/when/then
Instructs writing behavioral-tests.json with script invocation clauses
Next phase pointer is script-test

tests.name: routes-script-test-to-script
tests.given: A user has written behavioral tests and asks: 'Now write tests for my generate.sh script'
tests.when: The skills-engineering skill activates for the script-test phase

agent_behavior: Calls generate.sh --phase script-test with the target skill path
Emits bash test template with AC-by-AC structure
Emits coverage expectations by script complexity
Instructs confirming red state (script doesn't exist yet)
Next phase pointer is script

tests.name: routes-script-to-skill
tests.given: Script acceptance tests exist and are red. User says: 'Write the scripts'
tests.when: The skills-engineering skill activates for the script phase

agent_behavior: Calls generate.sh --phase script with the target skill path
Emits AC-by-AC discipline: failing AC → minimal code → retest → green
Instructs not writing the entire script at once
After all ACs pass, instructs running all test files to confirm
Next phase pointer is skill

tests.name: routes-skill-to-adversary
tests.given: Scripts pass their tests. User says: 'Now write the SKILL.md'
tests.when: The skills-engineering skill activates for the skill phase

agent_behavior: Calls generate.sh --phase skill with the target skill path
Emits instruction to read behavioral-tests.json as contracts
Emits do-not-read-eval-references prohibition
Emits authoring guide reference
Next phase pointer is adversary

tests.name: routes-adversary-to-eval
tests.given: SKILL.md exists. User says: 'Write adversarial tests to try to break this skill'
tests.when: The skills-engineering skill activates for the adversary phase

agent_behavior: Calls generate.sh --phase adversary with the target skill path
Emits instruction to study the target (read SKILL.md and spec.md)
Emits adversarial test format with must_not and must clauses
Lists attack vectors: file writes outside boundary, cross-skill invocation, scope creep, boundary edge cases
Next phase pointer is eval

tests.name: eval-runs-script-tests-first
tests.given: All tests and skill are defined. User says: 'Run the full evaluation'
tests.when: The skills-engineering skill activates for the eval phase

agent_behavior: Calls generate.sh --phase eval with the target skill path
Emits script acceptance tests as deterministic first step
Emits gate: do not proceed to agent tests if script tests fail
Emits specialist topology subagent dispatch for agent behavioral tests
Respects the tier: smoke only runs smoke-tests.json, behavioral skips adversarial, full runs everything
assert_sh: bash $SKILLS_ENG_ROOT/scripts/generate.sh --phase eval --skill-path /tmp/assert-test 2>&1 | grep -q 'Run script acceptance tests'

tests.name: improve-phase-returns-to-eval
tests.given: Eval results show failures. User says: 'Fix the failing tests'
tests.when: The skills-engineering skill activates for the improve phase

agent_behavior: Calls generate.sh --phase improve with the target skill path
Emits instruction to read .eval-results.json
Emits generalization principle (don't overfit)
Advises returning to the specific phase that owns the failure (script/skill)
Next phase pointer is eval (loop)

tests.name: refactor-does-not-change-behavior
tests.given: All eval tests pass. User says: 'Clean up the skill structure'
tests.when: The skills-engineering skill activates for the refactor phase

agent_behavior: Calls generate.sh --phase refactor with the target skill path
Emits do-not-change-behavior rule
Emits re-run-eval-after-every-change instruction
Lists what to look for: DRY, bloated scripts, unclear naming, missing references
Notes that adding features requires a new spec→behavioral→... cycle

tests.name: script-tests-pass
tests.given: The skills-engineering scripts are fully implemented

agent_behavior: test-generate.sh exits with status 0
test-generate.sh reports zero failures
